result: Successfully completed the data cleaning task. The R script loaded three wave files (wave_one, wave_two, wave_four) from data/input/, merged them by NSID using full_join, selected only parental education variables, harmonized missing value codes to the standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -3=Not asked, -2=Schedule not applicable, -1=Item not applicable), consolidated detailed education variables across waves prioritizing valid positive responses, derived collapsed 5-level NVQ variables (0=NVQ 4-5, 1=NVQ 1-3, 2=None/entry, 3=Other, 4=No qualifications), applied value labels to all variables, and output the final dataset with exactly 5 variables (NSID, educma, educpa, educdtlma, educdtlpa) to data/output/cleaned_data.csv containing 16,111 rows.
